title: Payment Platform payment-ds
summary: A Java full-stack payment system, covering the design and delivery of both the frontend console and the backend transaction API.
highlights: Designed and implemented the core interaction flow between the payment-ds-console frontend and the payment-ds-api backend
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline setup, automating deployment with Jenkins + Kubernetes
Led containerization efforts, unifying deployment configuration across dev/test/prod environments

title: Resume RAG Assistant (In Progress)
summary: A retrieval-augmented Q&A assistant built with Spring AI + pgvector, letting recruiters ask it directly about my project experience.
highlights: Vectorized my resume and project docs to build a searchable knowledge base
Structured information extraction using llama3.2:3b, with temperature 0.1 for stable output
My first hands-on project in transitioning to AI Engineer
